goal: Add a native Android target that is a 1:1 match of the desktop app: identical shared-Compose UI and all functionality (notes, markdown editor, tags, themes, export, settings).
globalContext: This is a Kotlin Multiplatform + Compose Multiplatform app (module :composeApp). UI lives entirely in src/commonMain and is shared. App.kt already renders a CompactLayout for width < 840.dp, so the phone UI is the same shared Compose code — do NOT fork or rewrite UI.

The existing target is jvm('desktop'). Mirror its platform actuals for Android in src/androidMain. Every expect in commonMain must have an Android actual: core/Platform.kt (newId,nowIso), auth/Pkce.kt (newPkceVerifier,pkceChallengeS256), platform/FolderPicker.kt (pickFolder), export/NoteExport.kt (exportNote,pickSaveFile).

Toolchain: Kotlin 2.1.21, Compose 1.8.2, Gradle 8.14.5, JDK 21, Android SDK at ANDROID_HOME with platforms 34/35/36 and build-tools 34/35/36. minSdk 30 (so D8 can dex ktor 3.2.0 synthetic names; java.time also available), compileSdk/targetSdk 35.
Do not break the desktop target or any existing tests. Keep changes surgical. Match the desktop look and behavior exactly.
Build verification is the source of truth. After your change the verify command for the unit MUST pass.

units.title: Add Android Gradle target + dependencies
units.acceptance: composeApp configures an androidTarget; :composeApp:assembleDebug reaches the compile step (failing only on missing actuals/manifest, which later units add).
units.description: In gradle/libs.versions.toml add the Android Gradle Plugin (androidApplication plugin alias, a version compatible with Gradle 8.14.5 — AGP 8.7.x) and androidx libs: activity-compose, core-ktx, and ktor-client-okhttp (Android HTTP engine). In the root build.gradle.kts add `alias(libs.plugins.androidApplication) apply false`. In composeApp/build.gradle.kts: apply the android application plugin, add `androidTarget()` to the kotlin{} block, add an androidMain source set with deps (compose.preview/ui-tooling-preview via debugImplementation if needed, androidx.activity.compose, androidx.core.ktx, ktor-client-okhttp, kotlinx-coroutines-android), and add an `android { namespace="app.pebo"; compileSdk=35; defaultConfig{ applicationId="app.pebo"; minSdk=26; targetSdk=35; versionCode=1; versionName="1.0.0" }; compileOptions{ source/target = JavaVersion 21 } }` block. Ensure compose.resources still generates for android. Do not remove the desktop target or compose.desktop block.
units.notes: Bootstrapped + verified: :composeApp:assembleDebug green; desktop compile + tests unaffected.

units.title: AndroidManifest, MainActivity, resources, launcher icon
units.acceptance: App has a single launcher Activity hosting the shared App() composable; manifest, themes, strings, and an adaptive launcher icon (from branding/) exist; assembleDebug builds the APK once actuals exist.
units.description: Create src/androidMain/AndroidManifest.xml with an <application> (label @string/app_name, theme @style/Theme.Pebo, RTL, allowBackup) and a single exported launcher MainActivity. Create src/androidMain/kotlin/app/pebo/MainActivity.kt: a ComponentActivity that enableEdgeToEdge, builds the same dependency graph as desktopMain/main.kt (FileSystem.SYSTEM, app dir = context.filesDir or getExternalFilesDir; FileAppPreferences at appDir/settings.conf; notes dir from PREF_NOTES_DIR or appDir; LocalNoteStore; NotesViewModel with storeFactory) and calls setContent { App(vm, notesBaseDir) }. Port the seedWelcomeNoteIfNeeded logic (or extract it to commonMain so both targets share it). Add res: values/strings.xml (app_name=Pebo), values/themes.xml (Theme.Pebo parent Theme.Material3.DayNight.NoActionBar or android:Theme.Material.NoActionBar), and an adaptive launcher icon (mipmap-anydpi-v26 ic_launcher + ic_launcher_round) generated from branding/pebo-logo PNGs with a background color matching the brand. Keep the brand dark title-bar feel via a dark status bar.
units.notes: Bootstrapped + verified: :composeApp:assembleDebug green; desktop compile + tests unaffected.

units.title: Android actuals: Platform + Pkce
units.acceptance: core/Platform.android.kt and auth/Pkce.android.kt provide actuals identical in behavior to the desktop versions.
units.description: Create src/androidMain/kotlin/app/pebo/core/Platform.android.kt with actual newId()=UUID.randomUUID().toString() and actual nowIso()=Instant.now().truncatedTo(ChronoUnit.MILLIS).toString() (java.time is available at minSdk 26). Create src/androidMain/kotlin/app/pebo/auth/Pkce.android.kt copying the desktop SecureRandom/SHA-256/Base64-url implementation verbatim (java.security + java.util.Base64 are available on Android 26+).
units.notes: Bootstrapped + verified: :composeApp:assembleDebug green; desktop compile + tests unaffected.

units.title: Android folder picker (foundation, coroutine-safe)
units.acceptance: platform/FolderPicker.android.kt compiles and never blocks the UI thread; default workspace works on a real filesystem path.
units.description: pickFolder is currently called synchronously inside a Compose clickable{} (SettingsScreen.kt). On Android you cannot block the main thread for a SAF result. Provide a compiling, ANR-safe actual: keep a process-wide weak reference to the current Activity (set in MainActivity) and a registered ActivityResultLauncher for OpenDocumentTree. For this foundation unit a minimal correct behavior is acceptable: if no real-path folder can be resolved, return null (no-op) rather than blocking. Full SAF selection + persisted permission + okio adapter is handled by unit android-folder-picker-saf. Default notes workspace must be a real path under getExternalFilesDir/filesDir so okio LocalNoteStore works out of the box.
units.notes: Bootstrapped + verified: :composeApp:assembleDebug green; desktop compile + tests unaffected.

units.title: Android note export actuals (HTML/DOCX/PNG/JPG/PDF)
units.acceptance: export/NoteExport.android.kt implements exportNote for all five formats and pickSaveFile; raster/PDF use android.graphics (no skiko).
units.description: Create src/androidMain/kotlin/app/pebo/export/NoteExport.android.kt. HTML and DOCX reuse the pure commonMain generators (markdownToHtml, markdownToWordDocumentXml, docxPackageParts) — just write bytes. For JPG/PNG/PDF, port the desktop Skiko renderer (MarkdownImageRenderer.desktop.kt) to android.graphics: reuse the shared parseMarkdownBlocks, parseInline, highlightCode, and the same palette/sizes; draw with android.graphics.Canvas/Paint/Bitmap; encode PNG/JPEG via Bitmap.compress; build PDF with android.graphics.pdf.PdfDocument paginated to A4. pickSaveFile: for the foundation, write into the app's external files dir (or Downloads via MediaStore) and return that real path; a proper SAF ACTION_CREATE_DOCUMENT + share flow is unit android-export-saf-share. Must run off the UI thread (callers already use Dispatchers.Default).
units.notes: Bootstrapped + verified: :composeApp:assembleDebug green; desktop compile + tests unaffected.

units.title: Green assembleDebug + desktop still builds
units.acceptance: :composeApp:assembleDebug produces a debug APK and :composeApp:compileKotlinDesktop still compiles.
units.description: Resolve any remaining compilation/resource errors so :composeApp:assembleDebug yields a debug APK. Then confirm the desktop target is unaffected (compileKotlinDesktop). Fix expect/actual mismatches, missing imports, resource linking, or manifest merger issues. Do not weaken or stub shared logic.
units.notes: Bootstrapped + verified: :composeApp:assembleDebug green; desktop compile + tests unaffected.

units.title: Full SAF folder selection + persisted access
units.acceptance: User can pick any folder via the system document-tree picker; selection persists across launches and the notes store reads/writes there.
units.description: Implement real 'Any folder you choose' parity. Use ACTION_OPEN_DOCUMENT_TREE via the Activity's ActivityResultLauncher, persist the URI permission (takePersistableUriPermission), and make the chosen tree usable by the okio-based LocalNoteStore — either by adapting okio FileSystem to DocumentFile/SAF, or by resolving a real path where the platform allows. Bridge the UI-thread clickable call to a coroutine without ANR (e.g., expose a suspend pickFolder and update the single call site in SettingsScreen.kt to launch it; behavior identical to desktop). Update StorageProvider/Settings copy if needed so 'Any folder you choose' is Active.
units.notes: Implemented by loop agent (SafFileSystem okio adapter + SAF picker + suspend pickFolder + call-site refactor). Verified green: assembleDebug + desktop compile + tests.

units.title: Export via SAF create-document + share sheet
units.acceptance: Exporting prompts a real Save/Share location and writes the file there; matches the desktop Save dialog UX.
units.description: Replace the foundation pickSaveFile with ACTION_CREATE_DOCUMENT (correct MIME per format) and/or an ACTION_SEND share sheet, writing through the returned content Uri. Keep the off-UI-thread contract. Ensure exported HTML/DOCX/PNG/JPG/PDF open correctly in other apps.
units.notes: SAF ACTION_CREATE_DOCUMENT Save As + write via ContentResolver. Validated: exported welcome-to-pebo.jpg (79KB) to Downloads on emulator.

units.title: Raster/PDF renderer visual parity with desktop
units.acceptance: Android PNG/JPG/PDF output visually matches the desktop Skiko export (layout, fonts, code colors, tables, quotes, images).
units.description: Tighten the android.graphics renderer so exported images/PDF match the desktop output: same page width/margins, heading sizes, code block background and syntax colors, table borders/header shading, blockquote bar, task list glyphs, image scaling, and inline bold/italic/strike/highlight/link/tag styling. Bundle or map the same fonts (Inter/JetBrains Mono from commonMain composeResources) for consistent metrics.
units.notes: android.graphics/PdfDocument renderer; exported JPG visually matches desktop Skiko output (heading, teal tags, purple inline code, bullets, margins).

units.title: Android SecureTokenStore (EncryptedSharedPreferences)
units.acceptance: An Android SecureTokenStore stores OAuth tokens encrypted at rest, mirroring DesktopSecureTokenStore semantics.
units.description: Provide an Android SecureTokenStore implementation backed by androidx.security:security-crypto EncryptedSharedPreferences (or Keystore-wrapped storage) with the same load/save/clear contract and StoredOAuthTokens serialization as DesktopSecureTokenStore. Add the dependency to androidMain. No tokens in plaintext.
units.notes: AndroidSecureTokenStore via EncryptedSharedPreferences (security-crypto). Verified assembleDebug green.

units.title: Android OAuth PKCE sign-in (Custom Tabs)
units.acceptance: OneDrive/Google sign-in works on Android via Custom Tabs + redirect; parity with DesktopOAuthSignIn.
units.description: Mirror DesktopOAuthSignIn for Android: launch the authorization URL in a Chrome Custom Tab, receive the redirect via a custom-scheme intent-filter Activity, validate state, and complete the code exchange through the shared OAuthSessionManager. Add an AndroidOAuthClientIds (BuildConfig or manifest meta-data) equivalent. Wire sign-in into Settings only where the desktop wires it (note: providers are currently available=false; keep behavior consistent unless the desktop enables them).
units.notes: AndroidOAuthSignIn (Custom Tabs) + OAuthRedirectActivity/Bus + AndroidOAuthClientIds; OAuthRedirectResult moved to commonMain. Built-but-unwired like desktop (needs client id). Verified assembleDebug + desktop tests.

units.title: Emulator UI parity pass vs desktop
units.acceptance: Each screen on the emulator matches the desktop app: note list, markdown editor + toolbar, sidebar/tag tree (drawer in compact), settings (themes, storage), command palette, focus mode, context menus.
units.description: Install the debug APK on the AVD (Pixel_3a_API_34), launch, and walk every surface. Capture screenshots (adb exec-out screencap) into tools/android-parity/logs/shots/. Compare with the desktop UI and fix any divergence that comes from platform behavior (insets/edge-to-edge, status bar color, ripple, density, font loading, drawer behavior, keyboard handling). Do NOT redesign — the goal is pixel/behavior parity with the shared design. Verify themes (several of the 37 palettes), light/dark/system, and the command palette (Ctrl/Cmd+K has no phone equivalent — ensure an on-screen affordance exists if the desktop relies on it).
units.notes: Emulator validation (Pixel_3a API 34): note list, editor (toolbar + live markdown + tags + inline code), sidebar tag tree, settings drawer, splash, export menu, SAF save all match desktop. Fixed system Back navigation. Screenshots in logs/shots.

units.title: Branded adaptive icon + splash + app name
units.acceptance: Launcher shows the Pebo adaptive icon; a branded splash (Android 12+ SplashScreen) appears; app name is Pebo.
units.description: Generate a proper adaptive launcher icon (foreground from branding/pebo-logo, brand background) for all densities, plus a monochrome layer for themed icons. Add a branded splash via androidx.core.splashscreen. Ensure app_name=Pebo. Keep visuals consistent with the desktop branding.
units.notes: Adaptive icon (gradient + white P + monochrome) from branding SVG; branded core-splashscreen. Validated on emulator.

units.title: Docs + release build config
units.acceptance: README documents how to run/build the Android app; assembleRelease config and signing guidance exist; CI/build notes updated.
units.description: Update README.md with an Android section (run on emulator/device, build APK with :composeApp:assembleDebug / bundle with :composeApp:bundleRelease). Add release build config (minify/resource-shrink if appropriate) and document signing. Update the 'Roadmap'/'Tech stack'/'Project structure' to reflect the shipped Android target.
